decisions.rationale: Asks which tab/button to press in Postal Vote BD to send a verification code, which matches the OTP send button intent.
Clearly asks which button is needed to send a verification code in Postal Vote BD; verification code maps to OTP sending.
Asks about submitting an OTP, not sending/requesting one. This fits an OTP submit button intent better than OTP send button.
Directly asks which option to press for OTP send in the Postal Vote app, matching the tag intent.
Asks which button to tap to send a one-time password in Postal Vote BD, a clear OTP send button question.
Asks which option is for OTP sending in Postal Vote BD, fitting the OTP send button concept.
Asks which option to touch in the Postal Vote app to send a verification code, matching OTP send/request button intent.
Asks which button to click to submit a verification code, not to send/request the OTP. This is closer to an OTP/code submit button tag.

result.packet_rationale: Rows that ask which button, tab, or option sends/requests an OTP or verification code in the Postal Vote app are clean. Rows using 'submit' for the OTP or verification code indicate entering/submitting a received code, so they collide with an OTP submit-button intent and should be dropped from this tag.
